description_long: This is a square, olive-green pillow with a soft, fabric exterior and a slightly puffy, filled appearance. The front surface features a printed design in white, including the word 'magazine', a keypad, and the phrase 'today is a good'. There is a visible pocket on the front, suggesting a functional element for holding small items like magazines or remotes. The pillow's corners are slightly pointed, giving it a plush, inviting look. The back and sides are plain, with the same olive-green color and no additional design elements. The overall condition appears clean and well-maintained, with no visible stains or damage.
description: A square olive-green pillow with a white printed design and a front pocket, featuring a soft, fabric exterior and a clean appearance.
description_view_0: Front view showing the printed design, pocket, and text details clearly.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the pillow's thickness and the seam along the edge, with the design partially visible.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the plain olive-green surface with no design or pocket.
description_view_3: Opposite side view highlighting the pillow's thickness and the continuation of the printed design along the edge.
attribute_pattern: graphic print with text and keypad illustration
